name: HowTo-Genie v4.0 — Viral Content Amplifier Engine

nodes.name: 📊 Performance Monitor (Every 6 Hours)
nodes.notes: Checks GA4 every 6 hours for viral signals when VIRAL_AMPLIFIER_ENABLED is true.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Load Config
nodes.notes: Runs core/01_Config_Loader.json for GOOGLE_SHEET_ID, GA4_PROPERTY_ID, GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_TOKEN, VIRAL_AMPLIFIER_ENABLED, VIRAL_VIEWS_7D_MIN, VIRAL_ENGAGEMENT_MIN, VIRAL_AMPLIFIER_TAB, WORDPRESS_URL.

nodes.name: 📈 Fetch GA4 Performance Data
nodes.notes: GA4 Data API. Property and token from config.

nodes.name: 🔥 Detect Viral Content
nodes.notes: Config-driven thresholds; GA4-only; outputs one item per qualifying row.

nodes.name: 📝 Append to Viral Amplifier Tab
nodes.notes: Appends qualifying rows to Viral Amplifier tab; sheet and tab from config.
